originalTitle: Security staff strikes averted at Aberdeen Airport
summary: The strikes, involving baggage screening staff, were due begin on Monday with the Unite union warning of "significant delays".
content:
The strikes, involving baggage screening staff, had been set to begin on Monday

Security staff at Aberdeen Airport have dropped 14 days of planned strike action after an agreement was reached over pay.

The strikes, involving baggage screening staff were due to begin on Monday.

The union said it had been left with no option as negotiations with ICTS HBS Security, through the conciliation service Acas, failed to produce a breakthrough.

ICTS said on Friday evening that an agreement had been reached and "proposed industrial action" had been cancelled.

Aberdeen Airport said it had "robust contingency measures" and no impact had been expected had the strikes gone ahead.

Aberdeen airport security staff back strike action in pay row

Summer strikes averted at Scottish airports as pay deals struck

The deal comes after summer strikes at Glasgow and Edinburgh airports were averted after new agreements were made.

Unite union members had unanimously supported industrial action at Aberdeen.

The union recently resolved two separate pay disputes at Aberdeen Airport involving ICTS central search and Aberdeen Airport Limited workers.

An ICTS Spokesman said: We're pleased to confirm that an agreement with our colleagues working within hold baggage screening at Aberdeen airport has been reached.

"We have been informed that the proposed industrial action will now not take place."
chineseTitle: 阿伯丁机场保安人员罢工得以避免
chineseSummary: 涉及行李检查人员的罢工定于周一开始，联合工会警告称“会严重延误”。
chineseContent:
涉及行李检查人员的罢工原定于周一开始

在就薪酬问题达成一致后，阿伯丁机场的保安人员取消了为期 14 天的罢工行动。

涉及行李检查人员的罢工定于周一开始。

该工会表示，由于通过调解服务 Acas 与 ICTS HBS Security 进行的谈判未能取得突破，因此他们别无选择。

ICTS 周五晚间表示，已达成协议，“拟议的罢工行动”已被取消。

阿伯丁机场表示，它有“强有力的应急措施”，如果罢工继续进行，预计不会产生任何影响。

阿伯丁机场保安人员反对工资罢工行动

由于薪资协议达成，苏格兰机场避免了夏季罢工

这项协议是在达成新协议后避免了格拉斯哥和爱丁堡机场夏季罢工之后达成的。

联合工会成员一致支持阿伯丁的罢工行动。

工会最近解决了阿伯丁机场的两起工资纠纷，涉及 ICTS 中央搜索和阿伯丁机场有限公司的员工。

ICTS 发言人表示：我们很高兴地确认，我们已与阿伯丁机场托运行李检查部门的同事达成了一项协议。

“我们已获悉，拟议的罢工行动现在将不会进行。”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
